cfjStatement: Provide operationally-ready, leasable non-residential space with reliable building infrastructure and tenant services, under a long-term rental/lease contract, at a risk-adjusted yield that funds capex and asset appreciation.

vnUnits.name: Commercial Real Estate Ecosystem
vnUnits.functionalJob: Economic community coordinating lessor–tenant value exchange for non-residential space

vnUnits.name: Site Acquisition & Development
vnUnits.functionalJob: Acquire and entitle developable parcels; secure zoning and permits

vnUnits.name: Building Construction & Fit-Out
vnUnits.functionalJob: Construct envelope, core-and-shell, and tenant improvements

vnUnits.name: Leasing & Tenant Onboarding
vnUnits.functionalJob: Market space, underwrite tenants, sign leases, onboard occupants

vnUnits.name: Property Operations & Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Deliver continuous building services, energy, and automation

vnUnits.name: Tenant Services & Turnover
vnUnits.functionalJob: Service active tenants; renew, rotate, and re-let space

vnUnits.name: Asset Disposal / Recapitalization
vnUnits.functionalJob: Refinance, recapitalize, or divest the asset at target yield

vnUnits.name: Facilities Management (H)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: maintain physical asset in rentable condition across all stages

vnUnits.name: ESG & Compliance Reporting (H)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: EU Taxonomy, GRESB, CSRD, GEG disclosures

vnUnits.name: Financial Administration (H)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: rent roll, CAM reconciliation, debt service, tax

vnUnits.name: Insurance & Risk (H)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: fire, liability, business-interruption underwriting

vnUnits.name: Building Energy Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: On-site generation, storage, grid coupling, and energy orchestration

vnUnits.name: Building Automation & Controls
vnUnits.functionalJob: BMS/BAS platforms, access control, lighting, security

vnUnits.name: Utilities Provisioning
vnUnits.functionalJob: Water, wastewater, submetering, telecom

vnUnits.name: Janitorial, Waste & Landscaping
vnUnits.functionalJob: Physical upkeep of common areas and grounds

vnUnits.name: Battery Energy Storage System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Containerized Li-ion BESS with PCS, EMS, MV coupling — Mein Solar PRIMARY POSITION

vnUnits.name: Rooftop / Carport PV Generator
vnUnits.functionalJob: On-site solar generation — Mein Solar SECONDARY POSITION

vnUnits.name: EV Charging Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: AC and HPC charging for tenant/fleet — Mein Solar SECONDARY POSITION

vnUnits.name: HVAC / Heat Pump Plant
vnUnits.functionalJob: Space heating/cooling central plant

vnUnits.name: CHP / Cogeneration Unit
vnUnits.functionalJob: Gas-fired combined heat and power

vnUnits.name: MV Grid Connection & Switchgear
vnUnits.functionalJob: Medium-voltage DSO connection and protection

vnUnits.name: Building Energy Management System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Site-level EMS orchestrating PV, BESS, HVAC, EV loads

vnUnits.name: Emergency / Standby Generator
vnUnits.functionalJob: Diesel or gas genset for resilience and black-start

vnUnits.name: Battery Modules & BMS
vnUnits.functionalJob: LFP cells, racks, battery management system

vnUnits.name: Power Conversion System
vnUnits.functionalJob: 4-quadrant bidirectional DC/AC inverter

vnUnits.name: MV Transformer & Switchgear
vnUnits.functionalJob: Step-up transformer and protection relays

vnUnits.name: Thermal Management Unit
vnUnits.functionalJob: Liquid cooling loop and container HVAC

vnUnits.name: Fire Suppression
vnUnits.functionalJob: NOVEC 1230/aerosol, deflagration venting

vnUnits.name: Energy Management Software
vnUnits.functionalJob: Dispatch optimizer for peak shaving, arbitrage, ancillary services

vnUnits.name: Container Enclosure
vnUnits.functionalJob: IP54 ISO HC container with racking and cable management
